idea: a 30-second time-lapse of a single tulip blooming in a sunlit windowsill, no narration
title: Tulip at the Window
logline: A single tulip slowly opens across a quiet sunlit windowsill as daylight warms the room.

characters.name: tulip
characters.description: single red-pink tulip in a small clear glass vase, green stem and leaves, initially closed petals that gradually bloom open, delicate natural texture

settings.name: windowsill
settings.description: simple white-painted windowsill in a calm room, morning sunlight streaming through clean glass, soft sheer curtain nearby, pale wall, gentle dust motes, quiet cinematic natural light

segments.name: 01-morning-unfurl
segments.prompt: Cinematic 15s time-lapse clip: a single red-pink tulip in a clear glass vase rests on a white sunlit windowsill, closed petals slowly loosening as warm morning light grows brighter, soft sheer curtain barely moving, dust motes drifting in natural light, realistic botanical detail, locked-off macro camera, shallow depth of field, peaceful visual rhythm. No subtitles, no captions, no visible text.
segments.firstFrameDescription: close macro still of a closed red-pink tulip standing in a clear glass vase on a white windowsill, soft golden morning sunlight touching the petals, sheer curtain blurred in the background

segments.name: 02-full-bloom
segments.prompt: Cinematic 15s time-lapse clip: the same single tulip continues blooming on the same sunlit windowsill, petals opening wider into a graceful full bloom as sunlight shifts across the sill, the glass vase catching bright highlights, leaves subtly lifting, natural realistic motion, serene locked-off camera, warm afternoon glow, delicate shadows on the wall. No subtitles, no captions, no visible text.
segments.firstFrameDescription: the same tulip half-open in its clear glass vase on the white windowsill, stronger sunlight spilling across the sill, soft petal shadows on the pale wall behind it
